name_en: M62295 Grey Monogram Eclipse! Chip Edition, ZIPPY Zip Vertical Wallet This Louis Vuitton Zippy vertical zip wallet, crafted from Monogram Eclipse canvas, is stylish and practical, an ideal choice for storing and carrying credit cards and cash. Secure wrap-around zip construction with multiple credit card slots, a zip coin pocket, and several bill and ticket compartments. 10.0 x 20.0 x 2.0 cm (L x H x W).
